definitions.name: late_admins
definitions.business_description: Conditional count of records where delay_minutes is greater than 60

definitions.name: late_pct
definitions.business_description: Conditional count of records where delay_minutes is greater than 60
definitions.technical_expression: CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN delay_minutes > 60 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) * 100

definitions.name: timing_category
definitions.technical_expression: CASE WHEN AVG(delay_minutes) <= 15 THEN 'On Time' WHEN AVG(delay_minutes) <= 60 THEN 'Slightly Delayed' ELSE 'Significantly Delayed' END

definitions.name: filter:where:MAR_ADMIN_INFO.MAR_ACTION_C
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where Administration action (1=Given, 2=Held, 3=Refused) is Given

definitions.name: filter:where:MAR_ADMIN_INFO.TAKEN_TIME
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where Time the medication was actually administered is not null

definitions.name: filter:having:unknown
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where COUNT(*) is at least 20

definitions.name: delay_minutes
definitions.business_description: The number of minutes between Time the medication was scheduled to be given and Time the medication was actually administered
conditions: Time the medication was actually administered is not null

definitions.name: admin_seq
definitions.business_description: Row ranking (used for deduplication or ordering)
conditions: Time the medication was actually administered is not null
definitions.technical_expression: ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY order_med.pat_enc_csn_id, order_med.order_med_id ORDER BY mar_admin_info.taken_time)

definitions.name: prev_admin_time
definitions.business_description: Row ranking (used for deduplication or ordering)
conditions: Time the medication was actually administered is not null
definitions.technical_expression: LAG(mar_admin_info.taken_time) OVER (PARTITION BY order_med.pat_enc_csn_id, order_med.order_med_id ORDER BY mar_admin_info.taken_time)

definitions.name: filter:where:MAR_ADMIN_INFO.MAR_ACTION_C
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where Administration action (1=Given, 2=Held, 3=Refused) is Given

definitions.name: filter:where:MAR_ADMIN_INFO.TAKEN_TIME
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where Time the medication was actually administered is not null
